description: HPKE (RFC 9180) export-bundle suite for ACTIVITY_TYPE_EXPORT_PRIVATE_KEY. The signer HPKE-seals the (signer-decrypted) private key to a caller-supplied P-256 recipient public key; the plaintext never leaves the signer except HPKE-encrypted. This is a clean RFC-9180 bundle (NOT byte-compatible with Turnkey's decryptExportBundle).

suite.aad: the privateKeyId string (UTF-8), bound as HPKE associated data — opening with a different privateKeyId MUST fail

recipientPublicKeyFormat: SEC1 uncompressed P-256: 0x04 || X(32) || Y(32) = 65 bytes = 130 hex chars (matches /^04[0-9a-f]{128}$/). The signer also accepts a compressed 33-byte recipient key.

bundleShape.encappedPublic: base64(enc) — HPKE encapsulated key (sender ephemeral public key)

roundTripNote: No static decrypt vector is captured because HPKE seal output is non-deterministic (fresh ephemeral KEM key per seal), so a fixed ciphertext is not reproducible across languages. Conformance is asserted in-language by a round-trip: generate a recipient P-256 keypair, server-seal a known secret to it under this suite/info/aad, then decryptExportBundle and assert the recovered bytes equal the secret (and that a mismatched privateKeyId aad fails to open). See packages/typescript/test/export.test.ts for the reference round-trip.
